# SecTransformMetaAttributeType.hasInboundConnection

**Case**

The attribute has an inbound connection.

## Declaration

```swift
case hasInboundConnection
```

## Discussion

This metadata value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the attribute has an inbound connection.
